rationale: In the citing paper, De Angelis et al. (2012) appears only in a grouped citation used to show that prior work has studied antecedents of WOM. The article does not engage that paper's specific generation-versus-transmission account, findings, or measures, and it is not used to derive hypotheses or interpret results. The citing paper's core argument is built on incentives, affect transfer, and evaluative conditioning, so this citation is background framing only.
